title: Argentinian Beef Stew
description: A hearty, comforting beef stew with a malty flavor, inspired by Argentinian cuisine. This velvety stew is perfect for a cold day.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef stew meat and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the beef broth, red wine, brown sugar, oregano, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
